summary: This file contains the core business logic for the local service marketplace. It handles operations like booking a service professional, verifying customer payments, and updating the status of a job.

keyFunctions.name: bookService
keyFunctions.purpose: Validates the user's ID, checks if the local professional is available at the requested time, and creates a new booking record in the database.

keyFunctions.name: completeJob
keyFunctions.purpose: Updates the job status to 'completed' and triggers the payment processing flow.
